authorization: User-authorized reduced Fig 3a (300M subset only) per mission document; this is Fig 3a (early exposure), NOT Fig 3b (compute-matched).
immutability: Once locked, immutable unless the user explicitly authorizes a change, or one of the mission's 4 permitted triggers (official-materials scope differs / dataset inaccessible / storage insufficient / hardware-software blocker) occurs AND is documented here BEFORE real training resumes.
disclosed_reductions: Only the 300M MusicPile subset is reproduced (paper Fig 3a sweeps 30M/150M/300M). Do NOT add sizes to 'complete' the grid.
One seed per condition (one-seed reproduction; no invented confidence intervals).
Several Stage-1/2/3 optimizer knobs are LOCAL_REPRODUCTION_CHOICE (no official author code found). Stage-2 fixed Fig-3a triple is provisional pending a lambda=0 pilot.
